full_text:
Wang Kuang (Gongjie) 王匡 (公節)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Kuang (王匡), styledGongjie (公節), was born in Taishan commandery, probably in Fenggao county. Took heavy losses against Dong Zhuo. Despised material things but could be violent. Wang Kuang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Wang Kuang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
